overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a forested mountain valley at dusk. The character moves through grassy meadows and dense pine forests with snow-capped mountains visible in the background, before turning around to survey the landscape behind him.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through grassy meadow toward distant snow-capped mountains

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance against purple dusk sky
tall evergreen pine trees scattered across the landscape
open grassy field with wildflowers and uneven terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through an open forest meadow at dusk. Snow-capped mountains dominate the distant horizon under a purple sky, while tall pine trees frame the sides of the wide grassy field.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail ascending hillside

events.description: entering denser forest area with canopy cover reducing sky visibility

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along a narrow dirt path, ascending slightly into denser forest

entered.detail: thick cluster of pine trees creating canopy cover overhead
narrow winding dirt path through the forest undergrowth

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a denser forest environment as the path narrows and ascends. The sky becomes partially obscured by pine canopy, casting deeper shadows on the dirt trail while the snow-capped mountains shift to the left side of the frame.

events.description: character executes sharp left turn, camera swings 180 degrees to face opposite direction

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns sharply to his left, spinning around to face the camera and survey the valley behind him

entered.detail: sweeping view of the forested valley and distant mountains now visible behind the character

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Geralt abruptly turns around, causing the camera to swing and reveal the expansive valley view behind him. The perspective shifts to show the character facing the camera with the snow-capped mountains now centered in the background, transitioning from the enclosed forest back to an open overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open mountain meadow into a dense forest before swinging back to reveal a wide valley overlook. It begins with Geralt walking through a wide grassy field at dusk, framed by tall pine trees with snow-capped mountains dominating the purple horizon. As the path narrows and ascends, the scene shifts into a denser forest where the pine canopy obscures the sky and casts deep shadows across the dirt trail. The camera then follows the character as he abruptly turns around, causing the perspective to swing away from the enclosed woods. Finally, the view opens back up to show Geralt facing the camera with the expansive valley and centered snow-capped mountains stretching out behind him.
